morning_brief.preview:
---
# EverPass Morning Brief — Thursday, May 28, 2026

## Critical / Time-Sensitive

1. **CHARTER** — BOTH 5/26 + 5/27 MEETING OUTCOMES UNLOGGED; EXHIBITS A (+43d) / B (+27d) OVERDUE; MISSION CONTROL DEADLINE JUNE 15 (18 DAYS)
   Two consecutive Charter meetings (5/26 and 5/27 Special Pricing) occurred — neither outcome is logged. EP counter v2 walk-away clause status (accepted / rejected / tabled) is unknown. Quick Charter Connect is on today's calendar — do NOT engage until both prior outcomes are recorded and current negotiating position is confirmed.
   **Deadline: LOG BOTH OUTCOMES IN COCKPIT BEFORE TODAY'S QUICK CHARTER CONNECT CALL. Assess counter v2 status first.**

2. **DIRECTV** — 5/26 MEETING OUTCOME UNLOGGED; DEMAND LETTER SEND DATE UNCONFIRMED; PRE-LITIGATION POSTURE ACTIVE
   5/26 DirecTV meeting occurred — outcome not logged. Net underpayment claim: $2,634,239.50 (gross $3,544,623); $65M second payment outstanding. Lynch (Kelley Drye) demand letter send date unconfirmed. No DirecTV response since ~April 6 (52+ days silence). Icenhower IP/NFL Sunday Ticket exposure may be in scope for a separate letter — confirm with Lynch.
   **Deadline: LOG 5/26 OUTCOME + CONFIRM DEMAND LETTER SEND DATE WITH LYNCH BY 10:00 AM ET TODAY.**

3. **TWDC/ESPN (McIntosh)** — TRACK A+B 23+ DAYS OVERDUE; "INBOUND THIS WEEK" WINDOW EXPIRES TODAY
   McIntosh "inbound next week" (per 5/22 operator update) expires today. If inbound has not arrived, escalation is no longer deferrable. Geary-Kaplan principal track dark 7+ months; escalation plan unconfirmed. Mission Control close deadline: June 15 (18 days).
   **Deadline: TODAY — confirm whether McIntosh inbound arrived. If not, execute Geary-Kaplan escalation immediately. EP Track A+B counter must be staged and ready before any contact.**

4. **CHSN** — SECTION 5(e) LAPSED ~60 DAYS; NO CURE PATH ON RECORD; WEEK 9 OF DRIFT
   Section 5(e) lapsed approximately March 29, 2026. No confirmed cure path. No outside counsel escalation confirmed. This has now crossed into material contract risk territory — longest-running unresolved exposure in the portfolio.
   **Deadline: DECIDE TODAY — cure vs. escalate to outside counsel. Cannot drift further.**

5. **ACCUWEATHER** — RYAN EMAIL TO McCORMACK BLOCKING DOCUSIGN (DAY 10); OPERATOR: READY TO SIGN
   All six open items resolved in May 19 draft. Ryan's confirmation email to Patrick McCormack (Patrick.McCormack@accuweather.com) on three pre-execution items (incl. Exhibit D) remains the sole blocker before DocuSign issues to AKaplan@everpass.com. Day 10 of unnecessary delay on a fully negotiated deal.
   **Deadline: OVERDUE — send email to McCormack NOW. Single action unlocks DocuSign.**

6. **NBCU** — ENO WINDOW 48 DAYS REMAINING (CLOSES JULY 15); MAY 18 APPLEMAN OUTCOME STILL UNLOGGED
   ENO window closes July 15, 2026. Matching Right $6M threshold unreachable at current $4.5M projected trajectory. May 18 Appleman call outcome not logged in cockpit. Geary-Kaplan principal track dark 7+ months; escalation plan unconfirmed.
   **Deadline: LOG APPLEMAN OUTCOME TODAY. Confirm Geary-Kaplan escalation plan before EOD.**

7. **NESN** — TERM SHEET v7 DEADLINE PASSED (+15 DAYS); PLAEHN CONTACT OVERDUE
   v7 deadline passed May 13. Plaehn "give a ring" signal was warm but cooling. MG structure: $300K combined Yrs 1–2 / $350K/yr from Yr 3. Gate 3 clearance unresolved.
   **Deadline: CONTACT PLAEHN TODAY — do not let this slip into a third week post-deadline.**

8. **VICTORY+** — COUNTER AMENDMENT DATED 2026-05-28; READY TO SIGN; TWO PROGRAMMER DELIVERABLES OUTSTANDING
   First Amendment (adding WNBA on zero-fee economics identical to NWSL) is fully drafted. Victory+ accepted EP-favorable terms clean. Operator PASS/NO-GO issued 2026-05-28: READY TO SIGN. Two hard-gate deliverables pending from Victory+ (WNBA match schedule §6.4; remaining Club zip/DMA lists §6.3) — do not hold signature for these.
   **Deadline: Confirm §3(b) MFN intent with EP counsel; route for CEO-to-CEO execution (AKaplan / Neil Gruninger) today.**

---

## Active Deal Status

items.text: Fully Executed Commercial Premises License in Place — EverPass and Amazon Content Services LLC have a fully executed Commercial Premises License Agreement covering TNF on Prime Video (NFL), NBA games (60+ regular season plus postseason), NASCAR Cup Series rac…

EverPass Is Not Exclusive for Small Venues; Effective Exclusivity Exists at Scale — DIRECTV FOR BUSINESS simultaneously distributes Apple TV F1, MLS, and MLB Friday Night Baseball to 300,000+ commercial venues; however, DIRECTV streaming has a 20-TV cap, mean…

Per-Event Fee Is $1,800 Up to 1,500 Concurrent Endpoints; Annual Service Fee Is $30,000 — Fixed fees: one-time activation fee of $20,000; annual service fee of $30,000; variable fees: $1,800 per live event (up to 1,500 concurrent delivery endpoints per event)…

Day-1 Dish Partnership Exploration Held — Charter-Parallel Model Receptive — First substantive packaging conversation between EP and Dish Business. Attendees: Andy, Kate (Dish); Ryan Blood, Alex Kaplan (EP). Sling Orange commercialization path closed by Dish…

Rate card is flagged as still under review — Schedule 1 carries a note that per-subscriber fees are "subject to Schedule 1 Section under the term sheet [Rate Card Under Review/Parties to Discuss]" and final rates are to be confirmed at execution; the current…

No Deal in Place; FOX Is the Only Major Broadcast Sports Provider Without an EverPass Agreement — FOX verbally committed EverPass as preferred commercial launch partner for Fox One DTC in July 2025; discussions stalled in November 2025 with no formal response…

Economics Gap: Zero-Fee vs. Paid-Per-Sub — EverPass proposes zero license fee with ad pass-through as consideration; Scripps Term Sheet requires paid per-sub fees at a rate card not yet provided. Neither side has moved and no counterpart economic draft exists.

RSN Distribution Is the Strategic Prize; MLB RSNs Cover Local Market Sports Beyond Baseball — The MLB RSN package would cover regional sports networks on a service-by-service, zip-code-defined territory basis; EverPass must distribute all RSN services as part…

bridge_signals.title: [?] Automatic reply: Content Pipeline
bridge_signals.summary: I am out of the office May 21& 22. I'll get back with you upon my return!

bridge_signals.title: [AccuWeather] Re: EverPass + AccuWeather Agreement
bridge_signals.summary: Hi Ryan, My legal team told me that the Docusign was sent to Alex, but I was not on the email personally. I asked the Legal team to double check. I will keep you posted. Looking forward to getting this signed and on to launching. Thanks! -P

bridge_signals.title: [DIRECTV (outside counsel - Kelley Drye)] Michael Lynch sent you "Draft Follow Up Letter to DIRECTV re Audit v4"
bridge_signals.summary: Hi all: Attached please find a draft letter along the lines we discussed.  Please send us comments when you have chance or we can just discuss on Tuesday. Thanks. MICHAEL C. LYNCH Chair, Litigation Practice Group Kelley Drye & Warren LLP

bridge_signals.title: [YouTube TV] Out of Office: Delayed Response Re: Fw: YouTube/ Everpass - Packaging
bridge_signals.summary: Hello, I am currently overseas on business travel so my responses will be delayed. For emergencies, please text me. Thank you for your patience. Tony

bridge_signals.title: [?] Ryan, have you adopted your new furry friend?
bridge_signals.summary: Let us know so we can send you tips on how to bond using TEMPTATIONS treats.

bridge_signals.title: [?] Re: YouTube/ Everpass - Packaging
bridge_signals.summary: Thanks again for the time last week. Following up on our last conversation - linked below (pword everpass) and also attached as a pdf is the go-to-market overview for the EverPass YouTube TV commercial venue channel. It maps out the full pi

bridge_signals.title: [AccuWeather] StreamTv
bridge_signals.summary: Hi Ryan, Glad we are close to the finish line on our agreement.  I see you plan to be at StreamTV in Denver next month.  I will be there and would love to find time to meet in person.  Please let me know if you have some avails. Thank you.
